title: ETSI EN 319 522-3 V1.2.1 Evidence
description: JSON Schema for Electronic Registered Delivery Service (ERDS) Evidence, structurally equivalent to the EvidenceType XML Schema in ETSI EN 319 522-3 V1.2.1 (namespace http://uri.etsi.org/19522/v1#). XML attributes are represented as properties; repeating elements are represented as arrays.

EvidenceIdentifier.description: String identifier for this evidence instance.

ERDSEventId.description: URI identifying the ERDS event that triggered production of this evidence (Table 2 of ETSI EN 319 522-3).

EventReasons.description: Container for one or more event reasons.

items.description: A single reason that caused the ERDS event. code is a URI; details provides optional elaboration.

Details.description: Optional additional details about the reason.

EventTime.description: Date and time of the event.

EvidenceIssuerPolicyID.description: One or more policy identifiers (URIs, or URNs per RFC 3061 for OID-based policies).

EvidenceIssuerDetails.description: Details of the entity that issued this evidence.

SenderDelegateDetails.description: Details of a delegate acting on behalf of the sender.

RecipientDetails.description: One or more recipients of the message.

RecipientsDelegateDetails.description: Zero or more delegates acting on behalf of recipients.

allOf.description: Extends UserDetailsType with the list of recipients for whom this delegate acts.

DelegatingRecipients.description: Indices (integers) of recipientDetails entries for which this delegate acts. Represented as xs:list of xs:integer in XSD.

SubmissionTime.description: Time at which the message was submitted.

EvidenceRefersToRecipient.description: 1-based index into recipientDetails identifying the specific recipient this evidence pertains to.

UserContentInfo.description: Metadata about the user message content.

ExternalERDSDetails.description: Details of an external ERDS involved in the delivery.

ForwardedToExternalSystem.description: Identifier of an external system to which the message was forwarded.

TransactionLogInformation.description: References to one or more external transaction logs.

TransactionLog.description: One or more transaction log entries (open content).

allOf.description: Extension element with an optional criticality flag (isCritical XML attribute).

isCritical.description: When true, processors that do not understand this extension MUST reject processing.

jadesSignature.description: Optional JAdES signature replacing the XML ds:Signature.

EntityDetailsType.description: Identity and optional certificate details for an entity (issuer or external ERDS).

CertificateDetails.description: One to three certificate representations, each being an X.509 certificate, a certificate ID, or a certificate ID and signature details (xs:choice maxOccurs='3').

oneOf.description: Certificate identified by digest and optional issuer/serial.
Certificate identified by digest and accompanied by signature details.

Any.description: Extension point for additional entity data.

IdentityAttributesType.description: One or more SAML Attributes describing the entity's identity.

AttributeValue.description: Zero or more attribute values (saml:AttributeValue); each value may be any type.

CertIDTypeV2.description: Certificate identifier comprising a digest and an optional issuer/serial (V2 variant per RFC 5652).

DigestMethod.description: XML digital signature DigestMethod: identifies the digest algorithm by URI.

IssuerSerialV2.description: DER-encoded IssuerSerial (V2) identifying the certificate issuer and serial number.

UserDetailsType.description: Identity, identifier, and assurance details for a user (sender, recipient, or delegate).

Identifier.description: Non-empty string identifier within a named scheme.

AssuranceLevelsDetails.description: Assurance level information expressed as one of two alternative structures (xs:choice of two sequences).

oneOf.description: Option 1: a global assurance level together with authentication details.
Option 2: per-factor assurance levels (authentication, identity proof, optional federation).

AuthenticationDetsAndAssuranceLevel.description: An assurance level paired with optional authentication details.

AssuranceLevelDetailsType.description: Details about a single assurance level, including an optional policy reference.

PolicyID.description: Optional URI identifying an applicable policy.

PolicyIDDetails.description: Optional textual details about the policy.

PolicyIDDetailsResources.description: Optional multilingual URIs for policy detail resources.

items.description: A URI tagged with a mandatory language code (xml:lang attribute).

AuthenticationDetailsType.description: Authentication details expressed as one of four alternatives: a SAML Assertion, an OAuth2 token, explicit time/method, or an opaque 'other' value.

oneOf.description: Explicit authentication time and method URI.

CertSignatureDetailsType.description: Signature details associated with a certificate reference.

SignatureMethodType.description: JSON projection of ds:SignatureMethod from XML Digital Signature (http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#). Contains a mandatory Algorithm URI attribute and optional additional content.

Algorithm.description: URI identifying the signature algorithm (required ds:SignatureMethod/@Algorithm attribute).

HMACOutputLength.description: Optional HMAC output length in bits (ds:HMACOutputLength).

Any.description: Optional extension content from other namespaces (xs:any namespace='##other' processContents='lax').

CertIDAndSignatureType.description: Certificate identifier together with signature details.

JAdESHeader.description: Decoded JAdES/JWS protected header represented as JSON for validation convenience.

x5t#S256.description: SHA-256 certificate thumbprint in base64url form.

JWSFlattenedJsonSerialization.description: Flattened JWS JSON serialization for JAdES.

JWSGeneralJsonSerialization.description: General JWS JSON serialization for JAdES.

JAdESSignature.description: JAdES signature replacing the XML ds:Signature element.

NonEmptyAttributedURIType.description: Non-empty URI with optional lang and scheme attributes.

lang.description: Language tag corresponding to xml:lang when applicable.

scheme.description: Optional scheme attribute from the XSD type.

AttributedNonEmptyStringType.description: Non-empty string with required type attribute.

DigestAlgAndValueType.description: Digest composed of ds:DigestMethod and ds:DigestValue.

DigestMethod.description: XML digital signature DigestMethod: identifies the digest algorithm by URI.

ConsignmentModeType.description: Consignment mode value from the XSD model.

ERDSMessageTypeType.description: ERDS message type value from the XSD model.

RelayMetadataType.description: Supplementary JSON projection of RelayMetadataType from the XSD.

InReplyTo.description: Optional message identifier to which this relay metadata refers.

RelayTime.description: Time at which the relay occurred.

UserContentInfo.description: Metadata about the user message content.

ApplicablePolicy.description: One or more policy identifiers (URIs, or URNs per RFC 3061 for OID-based policies).

jadesSignature.description: Optional JAdES signature replacing the XML ds:Signature element.

EntityIdentifierType.description: Non-empty string identifier within a named scheme — xs:simpleContent extension of NonEmptyStringType with required IdentifierSchemeName attribute

value.description: Text content of the element — the identifier value

IdentifierSchemeName.description: Required attribute identifying the naming scheme

ERDSMetadataType.description: Supplementary JSON projection of ERDSMetadataType from the XSD.

ERDSRootCACertLocation.description: Optional root CA certificate location URI.

ERDSExpiryDateAndTimeSupport.description: Whether expiry date and time is supported.

ERDSPolicySupport.description: One or more policy identifiers (URIs, or URNs per RFC 3061 for OID-based policies).

ExtensionsListType.description: Container corresponding to the XSD ExtensionsListType.

allOf.description: Supplementary JSON projection of an extension element.

NonEmptyMultiLangURIType.description: Non-empty URI with required language tag.

NonEmptyMultiLangURIListType.description: Container for one or more multilingual URIs.

PartInfoType.description: Supplementary XSD-derived reusable type corresponding to a content part.

ContentType.description: MIME type or other content type designation.

DigestMethod.description: Algorithm used to compute the digest (ds:DigestMethod).

PartsInfoType.description: Supplementary XSD-derived reusable type corresponding to a collection of content parts.

PartInfo.description: One or more partInfo elements describing individual content parts.

UserContentInfoType.description: Supplementary XSD-derived reusable type for user content information.

AppLayerIdentifier.description: Optional application-layer identifier for the message.

ComposingParts.description: Optional total number of parts composing the message.

PartsInfo.description: Container for one or more content parts.

Components.description: JSON projection of the XSD Components group, with ds:Signature fully replaced by jadesSignature.

EventReasons.description: Container for one or more event reasons.

items.description: A single reason that caused the ERDS event. code is a URI; details provides optional elaboration.

Details.description: Optional additional details about the reason.

EventTime.description: Date and time of the event.

EvidenceIssuerPolicyID.description: One or more policy identifiers (URIs, or URNs per RFC 3061 for OID-based policies).

EvidenceIssuerDetails.description: Details of the entity that issued this evidence.

SenderDelegateDetails.description: Details of a delegate acting on behalf of the sender.

RecipientDetails.description: One or more recipients of the message.

RecipientsDelegateDetails.description: Zero or more delegates acting on behalf of recipients.

allOf.description: Extends UserDetailsType with the list of recipients for whom this delegate acts.

DelegatingRecipients.description: Indices (integers) of recipientDetails entries for which this delegate acts. Represented as xs:list of xs:integer in XSD.

SubmissionTime.description: Time at which the message was submitted.

EvidenceRefersToRecipient.description: 1-based index into recipientDetails identifying the specific recipient this evidence pertains to.

UserContentInfo.description: Metadata about the user message content.

ExternalERDSDetails.description: Details of an external ERDS involved in the delivery.

ForwardedToExternalSystem.description: Identifier of an external system to which the message was forwarded.

TransactionLogInformation.description: References to one or more external transaction logs.

TransactionLog.description: One or more transaction log entries (open content).

allOf.description: Extension element with an optional criticality flag (isCritical XML attribute).

isCritical.description: When true, processors that do not understand this extension MUST reject processing.

jadesSignature.description: Optional JAdES signature replacing the XML ds:Signature element.

EvidenceIdentifier.description: String identifier for an evidence instance. Corresponds to the global XSD element EvidenceIdentifier (xs:string).

ERDSEventId.description: URI identifying the ERDS event that triggered production of an evidence (Table 2). Corresponds to the global XSD element ERDSEventId (NonEmptyURIType).

Evidence.description: JSON projection of the XSD Evidence element (EvidenceType) from ETSI EN 319 522-3 V1.2.1.

RelayMetadata.description: Bundled root schema for RelayMetadata, corresponding to the global RelayMetadata element.

ERDSMetadata.description: Bundled root schema for ERDSMetadata, corresponding to the global ERDSMetadata element.
